description: Generic op caching and RT arg patching

note: Mirror current C++ reference kernels (writer_send/reader_receive use PacketHeaderPool, no header CB) verbatim with semantic CB names. Python entry builds MeshProgramDescriptor with send+receive programs, fabric block [has_forward][conn][has_backward] via setup_fabric_connection, fresh GlobalSemaphore+synchronize_device per call. Intermediate spec: input layout/dtype, packet_page_dim=packet_size//element_size (bf8b: (packet_size//tile_size)*1024 since datum_size throws).

detail: 22/22 debug tests pass on (1,1) mesh + FABRIC_1D: ccl_packet_dims, _intermediate_spec (incl bf8b), allocation capacity, output alloc, global semaphore, grid helpers, get_fabric_node_id. Multi-device transfer (acceptance test) SKIPS: machine has 1 Blackhole device, test needs (1,2)=2 devices. No simulator configured; cannot change IRD.
